daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today, Virgo. You're radiating that 'I know exactly what I'm doing' energy, and honestly? People are noticing. Trust your gut instincts—they're surprisingly sharp rn.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a softness in the air around you. If you've been thinking about texting someone, the universe is lowkey encouraging it. Connection over perfection today.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is your superpower right now. That project or idea you've been sitting on? Today's the day to pitch it or take the next step. Your organized energy is magnetic to the right opportunities.
daily.health: Your body's asking for balance—maybe less doom-scrolling, more actual rest. Movement that feels good (not punishing) will elevate your whole mood. Even a quiet walk counts. Listen to what your energy needs.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are shifting your whole energy this week, Virgo. You're giving main character energy—trust the quiet confidence building inside you. Sometimes the most powerful moves are the ones nobody sees coming.
weekly.love: If you've been holding back, this is your sign to be a little more vulnerable. Whether you're single or taken, authenticity is your love language right now. Stop overthinking and let people see the real you.
weekly.career: Your attention to detail is about to pay off big time. Something you've been working on behind the scenes is ready to shine. Don't downplay your contributions—speak up about what you've accomplished.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and hydration this week. Energy dips aren't weakness; they're just your system recalibrating. Listen to what your gut's telling you, literally and metaphorically.
